'''Gepparin''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Gepparin system/Legends|Gepparin system]] of the [[Shelsha sector/Legends|Shelsha sector]]. It was the [[BloodScar base|headquarters]] of the [[BloodScar]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] gang, who had taken control of the large mining outpost on planet's surface during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], while the smaller farming outposts remained free. The base was [[Bombing of Gepparin|attacked]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and was completely destroyed.
